not_a_verdict: Independent adversarial verification (workflow of skeptics + a fresh re-check). This is INDEPENDENT-of-author evidence but is NOT a founder PASS gate. SUBMITTED for independent verification.
method: 4 parallel adversarial verifiers (effort=high) each trying to REFUTE one claim, then a fresh focused re-check of the fix.

claims.claim: No repair/replay/manual/migration/test completion can EVER produce RUNNING_CONFIRMED (classifier + live projection)
claims.note: Verifier ran classify_loop_state + simulated the live 50-row derive path; repair-only window => organic_age None => DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED. RUNNING_CONFIRMED only with a genuine coexisting fresh organic completion.

claims.claim: No runway receipt fabricates a cloud organic http_loop cycle or claims deployment/verification that did not happen
claims.note: All 11 receipts honestly labelled; local cycles marked execution_plane=local_reference; cloud marked EXTERNAL_ACTIVATION_REQUIRED.

claims.claim: Motor FSM: COMPLETED only via RUNNING+OUTPUT_COMMITTED; no terminal->RUNNING; duplicate idempotency dedupes
claims.note: Verifier found reclaim() ignored current state and terminal FAILED/TIMED_OUT held their lease => expired lease forced terminal->DISPATCHED->CLAIMED->RUNNING. FIX: clear lease on terminal entry; reclaim() gated to live CLAIMED/RUNNING only; replay is a dead-end marker (recovery = new attempt); DEAD_LETTERED made inert. Regression + BFS property tests added. Re-check found no counterexample.

claims.claim: Product docs contain no unsupported/marketing overclaim; cloud correctly marked EXTERNAL_ACTIVATION_REQUIRED
claims.note: All 8 docs audited; every RUNNING_CONFIRMED mention describes the fixed false-positive, not a live claim.

bug_found_and_fixed.severity: invariant-2 violation (terminal run could be resurrected to RUNNING via expired-lease reclaim)

post_fix_gate: full repo suite 327 passed; motor FSM suite 18 passed; BFS proof: no RUN_FINAL state reaches RUNNING
